title: Passthrough Signs
description: Enable the ability to right-click through wall signs, to interact with chests & other TileEntities
body:
Enable the ability to right-click through wall signs, to interact with chests & other TileEntities.

Example: Right-clicking on a sign attached to a chest will open the chest

As of **v. 2.0.0**, it now also works for banners, item frames & paintings (Configurable, off by default)

 

Required on both client & server side.

 

_**Modpack permissions**_

Feel free to use Passthrough Signs in any kind of modpack, as long as you link back to this page and don’t make any money of the modpack.

_**Credits**_

dmillerw, the original creator of the mod - before passing it onto me in 2015
